name: @vxrtx/extension
description: AI-powered tab and bookmark organization — Chrome extension

scripts.package:zip: [ -d dist ] && [ "$(ls -A dist)" ] && rm -f vxrtx-extension-*.zip && cd dist && zip -r ../vxrtx-extension-$npm_package_version.zip . || { echo '::error::dist/ is missing or empty — run build first'; exit 1; }
